sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104197" key="toixwru/xhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοιχωρῠ´χ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n104197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hole dug in the wall,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="2" id="n104197.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thievish trick,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:180" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.180</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
